title: Hopper Speed Tweaks
description: Change hopper transfer speed with a simple gamerule. Make hoppers faster, slower, or balanced for your server’s economy and performance.
body:
# Faster Customizable Hoppers

Hopper speed affects farms, storage systems, and server balance more than most people realize.

This mod lets you change hopper transfer speed using a simple gamerule, so you can speed up item movement, slow down automation, or fine-tune vanilla mechanics to fit your server.

## Features
- Configure hopper speed with `/gamerule hopperSpeed X.X`
- `1.0` = vanilla speed
- Higher values = faster hoppers
- Lower values = slower hoppers
- Great for balancing farms and automation-heavy servers

## Requirements
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
